_comment: Committed null schema for recurring-obligation rules (P35). Real rules live in pipeline/user-context/recurrence-rules.local.json (gitignored). tools/tasks.py materializes concrete occurrences on demand by date (never spawn-on-complete), idempotent on (recurrence_id, occurrence_index); a skipped cycle is an explicit cancelled occurrence; every occurrence inherits source from the template. RRULE subset only (FREQ, INTERVAL, COUNT xor UNTIL, BYDAY).
